productName: Mellow Prerolls, 2 x .5g, Full Flower Rosin Infused - GMO Cookies
description: A hybrid pre-roll of GMO Cookies supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of chemical, pepper, and pungent, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
